executive_summary: Brain healthy and synced-ready; operational attention remains localized in Mordomo/Zipper decisions, Google Workspace Zipper 2FA scope, LK Atendimento Chatwoot verification, and LK Growth upstream Shopify approval boundaries.

material_changes.summary: Daily Intelligence autohealed a local/documental Brain Health gap by linking LK Growth decisions in the parent MAPA; Brain Health ended FAIL=0/WARN=0 and Brain Improvement Score 100/100.
POS restock alert preflight now cures missing Stock OS origin for the whole order before sending a false 'stock not found' alert; local regression suite passed.
Local Stock OS active Shopify skeleton backfill inserted missing active Shopify SKUs into local/canonical database while preserving no-public-availability guardrail for skeleton rows.
Shopify upstream GMC field audit confirmed durable product-data corrections should happen through Shopify/Simprosys metafields, especially mm-google-shopping.color.
Klaviyo newsletter hero/template was updated in Draft only, with no send, schedule, or list mutation.
Artsy lead for a José Patrício artwork was converted into draft-only intake without price, availability, reservation, payment, discount, or logistics claims.

incidents.summary: Nightly Ops saw timeout in LC Mordomo OS whatsapp_context_engine; later runtime truth showed no current non-ok cron status. Treat as localized degradation/stale-metadata reconciliation, not a global gateway incident.
Chatwoot trigger disable attempt was failed_or_not_verified and message delete/cancel receipt has mixed HTTP 200 vs semantic result. Needs readback before declaring resolved.
2FA alert for seven Zipper users could not be fully audited through Admin Reports API due insufficient scope; do not route through LK credentials.

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: LK Stock recurring POS alert problem must be fixed at origin/database level, not SKU-by-SKU every day.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: local/read-only Stock OS preflight and database hygiene; no public availability promise from skeleton data

decisions_made_by_lucas.decision: LK newsletter image/copy corrections were authorized for draft/template correction only, not live send/schedule.
decisions_made_by_lucas.scope: Klaviyo campaign Draft update and readback

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Correct local data origin before alerting humans repeatedly about the same stock miss.
approvals_and_corrections.exact_scope: LK POS restock alert local preflight and local database promotion when safe

approvals_and_corrections.pattern: Shopify upstream/metafields are the durable correction path for GMC product data.
approvals_and_corrections.exact_scope: read-only audit and approval packet preparation

learning_ledger_candidates.learning: Brain Health decisions_not_linked can be autohealed as A1 when the fix is a local MAPA link and health check passes.
Stock OS skeleton rows are local search/crosswalk scaffolding, not proof of stock availability.
learning_ledger_candidates.verification_needed: Future agents must not use skeleton rows for customer availability claims.

learning_ledger_candidates.learning: Chatwoot automation changes require final-state readback; HTTP status alone is insufficient.
Google Workspace/Zipper security alerts must stay in Zipper context and not be handled with LK credentials.
learning_ledger_candidates.recommended_destination: multiempresa routing / Google Workspace security routine
learning_ledger_candidates.blocker: Admin Reports scope or Admin Console access needed.

may_become_A0_A1_when_safe: Local Brain MAPA/index link repair after Brain Health WARN
Read-only/local Stock OS preflight and local skeleton backfill with no public availability claim
Draft-only/internal preview updates where explicit draft scope is recorded
must_remain_A3_A4: Price, availability, reservation, negotiation, payment or logistics promises

pending_decisions_for_lucas: Choose/approve handling for Zipper/Mordomo P0 decision inbox items before any external replies.
Approve Google Workspace Zipper Admin Console/scope path to audit 2FA users.
Approve canonical rules for LK Growth upstream Shopify fields before batch product-data writes.
Approve or reject live send/schedule for LK Klaviyo newsletter after visual/content review.
safe_next_actions: Investigate Mordomo timeout locally/read-only and classify stale metadata vs real performance issue.
Prepare a concise decision queue for Zipper P0 items without sending externally.
Read back Chatwoot trigger state and message state before declaring Atendimento resolved.
Monitor next LK POS restock alerts for false 'stock not found' regressions.
blocked_actions_requiring_approval: Any Shopify/Tiny/GMC/Klaviyo/Meta/Supabase/database write beyond already scoped draft updates
Any Google Workspace admin/security mutation or credential/scope change
